Ntc Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award And For Entry Of Judgment
Off Calendar May-03-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PETITIONERS KENNETH LYNN, DAVID HERBERT AND KEITH HUBER'S Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award And For Entry Of Judgment is Granted. No opposition filed. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Harold Kahn; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976
